channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Browns QB Deshaun Watson carted off field with right Achilles tendon injury against Bengals
item.description: CLEVELAND (AP) — Deshaun Watson's unsuccessful and disappointing stay with Cleveland has taken another significant turn. The embattled quarterback was carted off the field Sunday with a right Achilles tendon injury he suffered on a non-contact play against the Cincinnati Bengals.
item.dc:creator: TOM WITHERS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Ilia Malinin lands 4 quads — and a backflip — to win his third straight Skate America title
item.description: World champion Ilia Malinin won Skate America on Sunday for the third consecutive year, altering his free skate on the fly after an early mistake and punctuating the program with a backflip that had been banned in competition until this season. The two-time and reigning U.S.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Texas apologizes to Georgia players, staff, SEC and game officials after fans throw trash on field
item.description: AUSTIN, Texas (AP) — Georgia coach Kirby Smart was initially careful with his words when asked about Texas fans littering the north end of the field with water bottles and other trash after an interception for the top-ranked Longhorns was briefly wiped out by a pass-interference penalty before offic
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN HAWKINS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Bigsby scores 2 TDs as Jaguars show fight in 32-16 win over Patriots in London
item.description: Tank Bigsby rushed for 118 yards and two touchdowns and Parker Washington returned a punt 96 yards for a score in Jacksonville’s 32-16 comeback win over the New England Patriots at Wembley Stadium.
item.dc:creator: Ken Maguire, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Slot hails 'hardest' win as Liverpool stays above Man City by beating Chelsea 2-1 in Premier League
item.description: Liverpool is looking more and more like Manchester City’s main title rival after beating resurgent Chelsea 2-1 to stay top of the Premier League table.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Bay Area high school football 2024: Where to find our complete Week 8 coverage
item.description: Weekend highlights include victories by De La Salle, St. Francis, Pittsburg, Menlo-Atherton, Campolindo.
item.dc:creator: Darren Sabedra, The Mercury News

item.title: Haason Reddick is ending his contract holdout and plans to report to the Jets on Monday
item.description: Haason Reddick is ending his long holdout with the New York Jets and will report to the team on Monday. Agent Drew Rosenhaus told The Associated Press on Sunday that Reddick agreed to an adjusted contract for this season and the sides will continue to work toward a long-term deal beyond this year.
item.dc:creator: DENNIS WASZAK Jr., Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Utes offensive struggles continue in 13-7 loss to TCU
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Utes football team hit a new low Saturday night, with an extremely disappointing 13-7 loss to TCU at Rice-Eccles Stadium. The offense managed just one touchdown, while freshman quarterback Isaac Wilson was sacked four times.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Gary Woodland with a 65 in Las Vegas is in contention for the first time since brain surgery
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — Former U.S. Open champion Gary Woodland finished 54 holes of the wind-delayed Shriners Children's Open knowing he'll have his best chance at winning since brain surgery more than a year ago. Best of all Saturday was being finished.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Kyle Larson opens the third round of NASCAR's playoffs as the title favorite
item.description: Kyle Larson has been lucky of late in Las Vegas, where he opens the third round of NASCAR's playoffs on top of the Cup Series standings and the favorite to win Sunday's race.
item.dc:creator: JENNA FRYER, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: BYU scores thrilling touchdown with 10 seconds left to fend off Oklahoma State upset
item.description: The BYU Cougars pulled off an epic victory against Oklahoma State on Friday night, thanks to Jake Retzlaff's touchdown pass to Darius Lassiter.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Anaheim knocks off Utah in overtime, 5-4
item.description: ANAHEIM, Calif. (AP) - After winning two overtime games to begin its first road trip, the Utah Hockey Club closed out the trip with an overtime loss.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Cole Kmet earns NFC Special Teams Player of the Week honors
item.description: Cole Kmet was named NFC Special Teams Player of the Week for Week 6 after successfully snapping on all five of the Bears' point-after attempts during their game in London against the Jacksonville Jaguars.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Illinois teen deemed ineligible for cross-country race after charity 5K
item.description: “I don’t really think there’s any reason that running a charity 5K should get me disqualified for running cross-country meets,” freshman Cole Deering said.
item.dc:creator: Jeff Bernthal, NewsNation

item.title: CMU football aims to win fourth straight conference game on homecoming
item.description: It's time for CMU homecoming and the Cowboys of New Mexico Highlands come in confident following their first win of the season
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: BYU hopes to finish strong after 6-0 start
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - From being picked 13th in the Big 12 Conference, to be ranked 13th in the nation, BYU is off to a 6-0 start for just the sixth time in school history without any superstars or sure-fire NFL prospects. In fact, 16 different players have scored touchdowns this year.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Stingrays at Tropicana Field relocated to The Florida Aquarium after hurricane damage
item.description: The stingrays at Tropicana Field have moved to a new home after the stadium sustained significant damage from Hurricane Milton last week.
item.dc:creator: Sara Filips, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Los Angeles Rams implementing new AI technology during football games
item.description: The technologically advanced home of the Los Angeles Rams is about to have a new way for fans to track players’ statistics from their seats during the game.
item.dc:creator: Will Conybeare, KTLA 5

item.title: Shohei Ohtani stolen base streak ends at 36 in NLCS, caught for first time since July 22
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — The Los Angeles Dodgers keep on winning in the playoffs, even without a bunch of home runs and stolen bases by Shohei Ohtani.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Doubs catches 2 TD passes in his return from a suspension to help Packers rout Cardinals 34-13
item.description: Romeo Doubs wanted to make amends after serving a one-game suspension for what the Green Bay Packers described as conduct detrimental to the team.
item.dc:creator: STEVE MEGARGEE, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Billy Crystal and Spike Lee take their places at the Hall of Fame as basketball superfans
item.description: Honored for his devotion to a basketball team that doesn't have a Hall of Fame history, Billy Crystal couldn't help but note the irony. The actor is being added to the Naismith Memorial Basketball Hall of Fame’s James F.
item.dc:creator: BRIAN MAHONEY, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Former LSU pole vaulter Mondo Duplantis proposes to girlfriend during Vogue photo shoot
item.description: Duplantis got down on one knee and proposed to Desiré Inglander while taking photos in The Hamptons. According to Vogue Scandinavia, the couple has been together for four years.
item.dc:creator: Trinity Velazquez, NewsNation
